serverInfo.name: THE 2PM CLUB
serverInfo.description: THE 2PM CLUB daytime disco event series by Boombastic Events Ltd. Provides access to upcoming event listings across Northampton, Milton Keynes, Coventry, Bedford, Luton, and Leicester.

resources.name: events
resources.description: All upcoming 2PM Club daytime disco events with dates, venues, prices, and availability

notes: No live MCP transport is currently active. Agents should use the JSON feeds directly. Ticket purchases must be completed by the user on the event page.
